_meta.title: wysiwyg — minimal fixture
_meta.fixture_purpose: Minimal valid wysiwyg block. Renders the block in isolation for snapshot testing.

blocks.html:
Looth Group restores beat-up Strats. We bring an iron lung to every job.

Why this matters

The instruments outlast their owners, and the marks they carry are part of the music. Stripping a 60-year-old finish reveals more than wood — it shows a chain of hands.

  • Original neck plate matches the body cavity stamp.
  • Pickup magnets are not original.
  • The peghead carries hand-carved initials.
